Class-Monk 20 — Male Human Monk: 20
Strength: 13 (+1) Dexterity: 19 (+4) Constitution: 18 (+4) Intelligence: 15 (+2) Wisdom: 18 (+4) Charisma: 12 (+1)
Background: Acolyte Alignment: Lawful Neutral Deity: None
Ability Boosts: Constitution: 2; Dexterity: 2; Intelligence: 1; Wisdom: 2 Experience: 907986/1000000 Level: 20 Size: Medium Speed: 60 Carry/Lift: 195/390
Ability Notes:
Ability Score Improvement: Ability Boost (Choose 2 from any)
Body And Mind: +4 Dexterity/+4 Wisdom
Boon Of Combat Prowess: Ability Boost (Choose 1 from any)
Durable: +1 Constitution
Grappler: Ability Boost (Choose 1 from Strength, Dexterity)
Unarmored Movement: +30 Speed in no armor
Ability Boosts: 7 to distribute
Acrobatic Movement: Can move across vertical surfaces and liquids when unarmored and not using a shield
Stride Of The Elements: Has 60' fly and swim Speeds while using Elemental Attunement
Features/Skills
Proficiency Bonus: +6
Feat Count: Epic Boon: 1; General: 5; Origin: 1 Selectable Feature Count: Monk (Monk Subclass)
Feats: Ability Score Improvement; Alert; Boon Of Combat Prowess; Durable; Grappler; Mage Slayer; Savage Attacker Human Features: Resourceful; Skillful; Versatile Monk Features: Acrobatic Movement; Body And Mind; Cloak Of Shadows; Deflect Attacks; Deflect Energy; Disciplined Survivor; Elemental Attunement; Elemental Burst; Elemental Epitome; Empowered Strikes; Epic Boon; Evasion; Extra Attack; Fleet Step; Flurry Of Healing And Harm; Hand Of Harm; Hand Of Healing; Hand Of Ultimate Mercy; Heightened Focus; Implements Of Mercy; Improved Shadow Step; Manipulate Elements; Martial Arts; Monk Subclass; Monk's Focus; Open Hand Technique; Perfect Focus; Physician's Touch; Quivering Palm; Save Proficiency (Strength; Dexterity); Self-Restoration; Shadow Arts; Shadow Step; Skill Proficiency (Choose 2 from Acrobatics, Athletics, History, Insight, Religion, Stealth); Slow Fall; Stillness Of Mind; Stride Of The Elements; Stunning Strike; Superior Defense; Tool Proficiency (Choose 1 from any Artisan's Tools, any Musical Instrument); Unarmored Defense; Unarmored Movement; Uncanny Metabolism; Warrior Of Mercy; Warrior Of Shadow; Warrior Of The Elements; Warrior Of The Open Hand; Weapon Proficiency (Simple Weapons; Light Weapons); Wholeness Of Body Acolyte Features: Ability Boost (Choose 3 from Intelligence, Wisdom, Charisma); Magic Initiate (Cleric); Skill Proficiency (Insight; Religion); Tool Proficiency (Calligrapher's Supplies)
Feature Notes:
Epic Boon: +1 Epic Boon Feat
Monk Subclass: 1 selection
Versatile: +1 Origin Feat
Resourceful: Gains Heroic Inspiration at the end of a long rest
Shadow Arts: Has 60' Darkvision
Skills:
Acrobatics: (dex) +4 Insight: (wis) +10 Performance: (cha) +1
Animal Handling: (wis) +4 Intimidation: (cha) +1 Persuasion: (cha) +7
Arcana: (int) +2 Investigation: (int) +2 Religion: (int) +8
Athletics: (str) +1 Medicine: (wis) +10 Sleight Of Hand: (dex) +4
Deception: (cha) +7 Nature: (int) +2 Stealth: (dex) +4
History: (int) +2 Perception: (wis) +4 Survival: (wis) +4
Skill Proficiency: Deception; Insight; Medicine; Persuasion; Religion
Tool Proficiency: Calligrapher's Supplies: (dex); Herbalism Kit: (int); Lute: (cha)
Languages: Common Sign Language; Common; Giant
Skill Notes:
Implements Of Mercy: Skill Proficiency (Insight; Medicine)/Tool Proficiency (Herbalism Kit)
Skillful: Skill Proficiency (Choose 1 from any)
Combat
Hit Points: 162 Initiative: +10 Armor Class: 18
Weapon Proficiency: Light Weapons; Simple Weapons
Armor: None Shield: None Weapons: Flail (+1 1d8+1 B; Sap); Javelin (+10 1d12+4 P R30/120; Slow); Mace (+10 1d12+4 B; Sap); Quarterstaff (+10 1d12+4 B [2h d8]; Topple); Unarmed Strike (+10 1d12+4 B)
Combat Notes:
Alert: +6 Initiative
Constitution Hit Points Adjustment: +80
Deflect Energy: Has increased Deflect Attacks effects
Dexterity Armor Class Adjustment: +4
Dexterity Attack Adjustment: +4
Dexterity Damage Adjustment: +4
Flurry Of Healing And Harm: Has increased Hand Of Harm effects
Heightened Focus: Has increased Flurry Of Blows, Patient Defense, and Step Of The Wind effects
Martial Arts: When unarmored and wielding only Monk weapons, gains +3 attack and damage with unarmed strikes and weapon attacks and raises their damage dice to 1d12
Monk's Focus: Has the Flurry Of Blows, Patient Defense, and Step Of The Wind features
Physician's Touch: Has increased Hand Of Harm effects
Strength Attack Adjustment: +1
Strength Damage Adjustment: +1
Unarmored Defense: +4 Armor Class in no armor
Alert: Can swap initiatives with a willing ally
Boon Of Combat Prowess: Can treat an attack miss as a hit once per turn
Deflect Attacks: Can use a reaction to reduce suffered damage by 1d10+24 HP; reducing it to 0 HP allows expending 1 focus point to redirect 2d12+4 HP (save DC 18 Dexterity negates) to an adjacent creature, or to a creature within 60' if the damage came from a ranged attack
Durable: Regains a minimum of 8 hit points from a Hit Die roll
Elemental Attunement: Can expend 1 focus point to gain +10' reach with unarmed strikes that can inflict a choice of acid, cold, fire, lightning, or thunder and an optional 10' push (save DC 18 Strength negates) instead of normal damage, for 10 min
Elemental Epitome: Step Of The Wind gives +20 Speed until the end of the turn and inflicts 1d12 HP of a choice of acid, cold, fire, lightning, or thunder to targets passed within 5'/Unarmed strike inflicts +1d12 HP once per turn while using Elemental Attunement
Empowered Strikes: Can inflict force damage with unarmed strikes
Extra Attack: Can make 2 attacks during an Attack action
Fleet Step: Can use Step Of The Wind immediately after another bonus action
Flurry Of Blows: Can spend 1 focus point to make 3 unarmed strikes as a bonus action
Grappler: Can both Damage and Grapple with an unarmed strike once per turn, has advantage on attacks on a grappled foe, and can move at full speed with a grappled foe of Medium size or smaller
Hand Of Harm: Can inflict +1d12+4 HP necrotic and poisoned until the end of the next turn with an unarmed strike once per turn
Improved Shadow Step: Can expend 1 focus point to Shadow Step between lighted areas and to make an unarmed strike after teleporting
Mage Slayer: Can use a reaction to attack an adjacent caster/Foe suffers disadvantage on concentration to maintain a spell in response to a self attack
Martial Arts: Can use a bonus action to make an unarmed strike and can use Dexterity instead of Strength to Grapple and Shove
Monk's Focus: Can use 20 focus points per short rest
Open Hand Technique: Can use Flurry of Blows to inflict a choice of knocked prone (save DC 18 Dexterity negates), a 15' push (save DC 18 Strength negates), or loss of opportunity attacks until the start of the target's next turn
Patient Defense: Can use a bonus action to Disengage, optionally spending 1 focus point to Dodge and to gain 2d12 temporary hit points
Perfect Focus: Has a minimum of 4 focus points available after initiative
Quivering Palm: Can spend 4 focus points after a successful unarmed attack to inflict 10d12 HP force (save DC 18 Constitution half) at any time within 20 days
Savage Attacker: Can use the better of 2 damage rolls once per turn
Shadow Step: Can use a bonus action to teleport 60' between dim or dark areas and gain advantage on the first melee attack during that turn
Step Of The Wind: Can use a bonus action to Dash, optionally spending 1 focus point to Disengage and to double jump distance; can bring along 1 willing Large creature when moving without provoking opportunity attacks
Stunning Strike: Can spend 1 focus point after a successful attack to stun the target (save DC 18 Constitution inflicts half Speed and advantage on the next foe attack) until the start of the next turn
Uncanny Metabolism: Can regain all focus points and 1d12+20 hit points during initiative once per long rest
Wholeness Of Body: Can use an bonus action to regain 1d12+4 hit points 4 times per long rest
Save Proficiency: Charisma; Constitution; Dexterity; Intelligence; Strength; Wisdom
Save: Charisma: +7; Constitution: +10; Dexterity: +10; Intelligence: +8; Strength: +7; Wisdom: +10
Save Notes:
Disciplined Survivor: Proficient on all saves
Disciplined Survivor: Can spend 1 focus point to reroll a save
Elemental Epitome: Has resistance to a choice of acid, cold, fire, lightning, or thunder each rd while using Elemental Attunement
Evasion: Successful Dexterity saves yield no damage instead of half, and failures yield half damage
Mage Slayer: Has advantage on saves vs. spells cast by adjacent foes
Self-Restoration: Can end a charmed, frightened, or poisoned condition affecting self at the end of each turn, and does not suffer exhaustion from lack of food or drink
Slow Fall: Can use a reaction to reduce falling damage by 100 HP
Stillness Of Mind: Can use an action to end charm or fright affecting self
Superior Defense: Can spend 3 focus points to gain resistance to non-force damage for 1 min
Magic
Spells Known/Prepared: C0: 2; C: 1 Attack: C: +10; Monk: +10 Spell DC: C: 18; Monk: 18
Spells:
Darkness (Monk2 [Shadow Arts] Evoc): R60' Target centers a 15' radius lightless area for concentration up to 10 min
Elementalism (Monk0 [Manipulate Elements] Tran): R30' Moves air or dust in a 5' cube, creates smoke or mist in a 5' cube for 1 min, or sculpts a 1' cube of dirt, sand, fire, smoke, mist, or water for 1 hr
Minor Illusion (Monk0 [Shadow Arts] Illu): R30' Creates the sound of 1 creature or a 5' cube image (Investigation detects) for 1 min
Magic Notes:
Flurry Of Healing And Harm: Has increased Hand Of Healing effects
Physician's Touch: Has increased Hand Of Healing effects
Cloak Of Shadows: Can expend 5 focus points in dim light or darkness to become invisible, move through occupied spaces as difficult terrain, and use Flurry Of Blows without expending addition focus points, for 1 min or until ending a turn in bright light
Elemental Burst: R120' Expending 2 focus points causes a 20' radius to inflict 3d12 HP of a choice of acid, cold, fire, lightning, or thunder (save DC 18 Dexterity half)
Hand Of Healing: Can spend 1 focus point or forego 1 or more Flurry Of Blows strikes to use touch to restore 1d12+4 hit points and to end a condition
Hand Of Ultimate Mercy: Can spend 5 focus points to revive a corpse dead up to 24 hr, restoring 4d10+4 hit points and removing conditions, once per long rest
Magic Initiate (Cleric): Knows 2 Cleric cantrips and can cast a chosen C1 spell without expending a spell slot once per long rest
Shadow Arts: Can spend 1 focus point to cast Darkness without components and can move its effect within 60' of self each rd
Notes
Validation Warnings: Unproficient Weapon Penalty.Flail: -6 attack
Validation Errors: Selectable Feature Allocation: 1 available vs. 4 allocated
